THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSCACCI, LAUREN BOSCACCI, NANCY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, $2,500 TO BE PD 10-24-96. $500 MONTHLY PMTS THEREAFTER START ING 12-1-96 W/LATE CHARG DUE IF PD AFTER 10TH OF MO. IF 2 CO NSECUTIVE MONTHS AREN'T PD, TOTAL AMOUNT OF $19,000 IMMEDIAT ELY DUE. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY FEES & COSTS.
